entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop studied for male sterility

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional pollen, characterized by translucent white anthers

entities.name: HAND POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of manually transferring pollen from a donor plant to a recipient plant

entities.name: JL 24
entities.description: A short-duration Indian cultivar of groundnut used for pollination

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TESTS
entities.description: Statistical method used to analyze the segregation of male fertile and male sterile plants

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to produce functional pollen

entities.name: MS1
entities.description: A recessive gene that governs male sterility in groundnut

entities.name: MS2
entities.description: A recessive gene that governs male sterility in groundnut
